MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Streve Maki.
Attorney Margaret DeMatteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gregory Bryant is present.
Attorney Jenna Feistritzer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-19-2013 is vacated.
